ast.name: log
ast.target: 已成功从以下位置加载凭据：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional prefix to add to all synced note titles
ast.target: 可选前缀，将添加到所有同步笔记标题中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to your Granola authentication key file
ast.target: 您的 Granola 认证密钥文件路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format for dates in filenames. Use YYYY (year), MM (month), DD (day)
ast.target: 文件名中日期的格式。使用 YYYY（年）、MM（月）、DD（日）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include your personal notes from Granola in a "## My Notes" section. These are the notes you write yourself during meetings.
ast.target: 在“## 我的笔记”部分包含您来自 Granola 的个人笔记。这些是您在会议期间自己写的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include AI-generated enhanced notes from Granola in a "## Enhanced Notes" section. These are the AI summaries Granola creates.
ast.target: 在“## 增强笔记”部分包含来自 Granola 的 AI 生成增强笔记。这些是 Granola 创建的 AI 摘要。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include the full meeting transcript in each note under a "## Transcript" section. This requires an additional API call per note and may slow down sync.
ast.target: 在每个笔记的“## 转录”部分包含完整的会议转录。这需要每个笔记额外调用一次 API，可能会减慢同步速度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show timestamps (HH:MM:SS) next to each speaker in the transcript.
ast.target: 在转录中每个说话者旁边显示时间戳 (HH:MM:SS)。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Character to separate words in filenames (underscore, hyphen, space, or none)
ast.target: 文件名中分隔单词的字符（下划线、连字符、空格或无）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose what to do when syncing a note with a filename that already exists
ast.target: 选择同步文件名已存在的笔记时要执行的操作

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to automatically sync notes

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, sync will fetch ALL notes from Granola (not just the most recent 100). This may take longer on first sync but ensures all historical notes are included.
ast.target: 启用后，同步将从 Granola 获取所有笔记（而不仅仅是最近的 100 条）。首次同步可能需要更长时间，但可确保包含所有历史笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of documents to sync from Granola (most recent notes will be synced first)
ast.target: 从 Granola 同步的最大文档数量（将优先同步最近的笔记）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, notes that already exist will not be updated during sync. This preserves any manual tags, summaries, or other additions you've made.
ast.target: 启用后，同步期间不会更新已存在的笔记。这将保留您手动添加的标签、摘要或其他任何内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Organize notes into subfolders based on their creation date
ast.target: 根据笔记的创建日期将其组织到子文件夹中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format for date-based folder structure. Examples: "YYYY-MM-DD" or "YYYY/MM/DD" subfolders
ast.target: 基于日期的文件夹结构格式。示例：\"YYYY-MM-DD\" 或 \"YYYY/MM/DD\" 子文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose where to search for existing notes when checking granola-id. "Sync directory only" (default) only checks the configured sync folder. "Entire vault" allows you to move notes anywhere in your vault. "Specific folders" lets you choose which folders to search.
ast.target: 选择在检查 granola-id 时搜索现有笔记的范围。\"仅同步目录\"（默认）仅检查已配置的同步文件夹。\"整个库\"允许您将笔记移动到库中的任何位置。\"特定文件夹\"让您选择要搜索哪些文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add the meeting title as a "title" field in frontmatter. Disable if you want to use the filename as the single source of truth.
ast.target: 在 frontmatter 中添加会议标题作为 \"title\" 字段。如果您希望使用文件名作为唯一真实来源，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add created_at and updated_at fields to frontmatter
ast.target: 在 frontmatter 中添加 created_at 和 updated_at 字段

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how dates are formatted in frontmatter
ast.target: 选择 frontmatter 中日期的格式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use YYYY for year, MM for month, DD for day, HH for hour, mm for minute, ss for second. Example: YYYY-MM-DD
ast.target: 使用 YYYY 表示年份，MM 表示月份，DD 表示日期，HH 表示小时，mm 表示分钟，ss 表示秒。示例：YYYY-MM-DD

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add custom fields to frontmatter. One per line in "key: value" format. Example: "type: meeting" or "status: draft"
ast.target: 向 frontmatter 添加自定义字段。每行一个，格式为 \"key: value\"。示例：\"type: meeting\" 或 \"status: draft\"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add meeting attendees as tags in the frontmatter of each note
ast.target: 将会议与会者作为标签添加到每个笔记的 frontmatter 中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When adding attendee tags, exclude your own name from the list
ast.target: 添加与会者标签时，从列表中排除您自己的姓名

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your name as it appears in Granola meetings (used to exclude from attendee tags)
ast.target: 您在 Granola 会议中显示的姓名（用于从与会者标签中排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize the structure of attendee tags. Use {name} as placeholder for the attendee name. Examples: "person/{name}", "people/{name}", "meeting-attendees/{name}"
ast.target: 自定义与会者标签的结构。使用 {name} 作为与会者姓名的占位符。示例：\"person/{name}\"、\"people/{name}\"、\"meeting-attendees/{name}\"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add meeting attendees as Obsidian wikilinks in a separate frontmatter property (e.g. participants: ["[[Eddie Brock]]"])
ast.target: 将会议与会者作为 Obsidian wiki 链接添加到单独的 frontmatter 属性中（例如 participants: [\"[[Eddie Brock]]\"]）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter property name used for attendee wikilinks (default: participants)
ast.target: 用于与会者 wiki 链接的 frontmatter 属性名称（默认：participants）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add Granola folder names as tags in the frontmatter of each note (requires Granola folders to be enabled)
ast.target: 将 Granola 文件夹名称作为标签添加到每个笔记的 frontmatter 中（需要启用 Granola 文件夹）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a link back to the original Granola note in the frontmatter (e.g., granola_url: "https://notes.granola.ai/d/...")
ast.target: 在 frontmatter 中添加指向原始 Granola 笔记的链接（例如 granola_url: \"https://notes.granola.ai/d/...\"）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add todays meetings to your daily note
ast.target: 将今日会议添加到您的每日笔记中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The heading name for the Granola meetings section in your daily note
ast.target: 每日笔记中 Granola 会议部分的标题名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add todays meetings to your periodic notes (daily, weekly, or monthly - requires Periodic Notes plugin)
ast.target: 将今日会议添加到您的周期性笔记中（每日、每周或每月 - 需要 Periodic Notes 插件）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The heading name for the Granola meetings section in your periodic notes (works with daily, weekly, or monthly notes)
ast.target: 周期性笔记中 Granola 会议部分的标题名称（适用于每日、每周或每月笔记）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Organize notes into folders based on Granola folder structure. This will create subfolders in your sync directory for each Granola folder.
ast.target: 根据 Granola 文件夹结构将笔记组织到文件夹中。这将在您的同步目录中为每个 Granola 文件夹创建子文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize the structure of folder tags. Use {name} as placeholder for the folder name. Examples: "folder/{name}", "granola/{name}", "meeting-folders/{name}"
ast.target: 自定义文件夹标签的结构。使用 {name} 作为文件夹名称的占位符。示例：\"folder/{name}\"、\"granola/{name}\"、\"meeting-folders/{name}\"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only sync notes from selected Granola folders. When disabled, all notes are synced.
ast.target: 仅同步来自选定 Granola 文件夹的笔记。禁用时，将同步所有笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fetch the latest list of folders from Granola
ast.target: 从 Granola 获取最新的文件夹列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Directory within your vault where Granola notes will be synced
ast.target: 库中用于同步 Granola 笔记的目录

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Click to manually sync your Granola notes
ast.target: 点击手动同步您的 Granola 笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Move all existing Granola notes into the correct folders based on your current date-based or Granola folder settings. This will not create duplicates.
ast.target: 根据您当前的基于日期或 Granola 文件夹设置，将所有现有 Granola 笔记移动到正确的文件夹中。这不会创建重复项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically move existing Granola notes to their correct folders after each sync. Only works when Granola folders or date-based folders are enabled.
ast.target: 每次同步后自动将现有 Granola 笔记移动到其正确的文件夹。仅在启用 Granola 文件夹或基于日期的文件夹时有效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Find and list notes with the same granola-id (helpful after changing search scope settings)
ast.target: 查找并列出具有相同 granola-id 的笔记（在更改搜索范围设置后很有用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-enable auto-sync after testing new search scope settings (this will restart the auto-sync timer)
ast.target: 在测试新的搜索范围设置后重新启用自动同步（这将重启自动同步计时器）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: When file already exists by name

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用基于日期的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在 frontmatter 中包含标题

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在 frontmatter 中包含日期

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从标签中排除我的姓名

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将现有笔记重新组织到文件夹中

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 同步后自动重新组织笔记

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target:
示例：
会议
项目/工作
每日笔记

ast.name: setText
ast.source: ⚠️ The features below are experimental and may create duplicate notes if not used carefully. Please backup your vault before changing these settings.
ast.target: ⚠️ 以下功能为实验性功能，如果使用不当可能会创建重复笔记。请在更改这些设置前备份您的库。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: ⚠️ 未检测到 Periodic Notes 插件

ast.name: setText
ast.source: The Periodic Notes plugin is not installed or enabled. This integration will not work until the plugin is installed.
ast.target: Periodic Notes 插件未安装或未启用。在安装该插件之前，此集成将无法工作。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Check the folders you want to sync. Only notes in selected folders will be synced.
ast.target: 勾选您想要同步的文件夹。只有所选文件夹中的笔记才会被同步。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No folders loaded. Click "Refresh folders" to fetch available folders from Granola, or run a sync first.
ast.target: 未加载任何文件夹。点击 \"刷新文件夹\" 从 Granola 获取可用文件夹，或先运行一次同步。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Granola auth path is not a file, skipping:
ast.target: Granola 认证路径不是文件，跳过：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not read Granola Safe Storage from macOS Keychain:
ast.target: 无法从 macOS 钥匙串读取 Granola 安全存储：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 未在以下位置找到 Granola storage.dek：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: Granola storage.dek 解密结果异常

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 字节；无法派生 32 字节 DEK

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 解密 Granola storage.dek 失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to decrypt Granola encrypted credentials file:
ast.target: 解密 Granola 加密凭据文件失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: All Granola credential sources hold expired tokens; using stale token from:
ast.target: 所有 Granola 凭据源均持有过期令牌；正在使用来自以下位置的陈旧令牌：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: — the next API call will likely 401. Restart Granola or reauthenticate to refresh.
ast.target: — 下一次 API 调用很可能会返回 401。请重启 Granola 或重新认证以刷新。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cannot move file - target already exists:
ast.target: 无法移动文件 - 目标已存在：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error finding duplicate notes. Check console for details.
ast.target: 查找重复笔记时出错。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 重复项报告已创建并打开

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error creating duplicates report. Check console for details.
ast.target: 创建重复项报告时出错。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error processing duplicates. Check console for details.
ast.target: 处理重复项时出错。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Starting reorganization of existing Granola notes...
ast.target: 开始重新组织现有Granola笔记...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Granola notes found to reorganize
ast.target: 未找到需要重新组织的Granola笔记

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error during reorganization. Check console for details.
ast.target: 重新组织过程中出错。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a valid positive number
ast.target: 请输入一个有效的正数

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Search scope changed. Consider running a manual sync to test the new settings before relying on auto-sync.
ast.target: 搜索范围已更改。建议在依赖自动同步之前，先运行一次手动同步以测试新设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not load credentials. Please check your auth key path.
ast.target: 无法加载凭据。请检查您的认证密钥路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not fetch folders from Granola

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error fetching folders. Check console for details.
ast.target: 获取文件夹时出错。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已使用当前设置重新启用自动同步

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 集成设置已重置为禁用状态

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 文件夹设置已重置为默认值

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将Granola笔记重新组织到文件夹中
